user_query: The workshop on Day 3 ends at 11am and then I have nothing until the AGO at noon. Add a coffee break in between. there's a good cafe near the gallery.

fields.name: Boxcar Social (near AGO)
fields.description: Popular cafe a short walk from the Art Gallery of Ontario serving specialty coffee, espresso drinks, and light pastries — perfect for a quick mid-morning break.

insertion_point.reasoning: Place coffee break between the workshop (ends 11:00 AM) and AGO (12:00 PM); 11:15–11:45 fits in the gap and is a short walk to the gallery.
